_comment: Default wallet set for the whale_position_monitor tool. Small on purpose (architecture.md open question: don't over-invest in curation). These are someone else's curation, not an endorsement; positions change constantly. Callers can always pass their own `wallets`. Community PRs to extend this list are welcome.

provenance.source: Hyperdash public leaderboard (hyperdash.info), top addresses by PnL.
provenance.captured: Pre-build API spike; see data_exploration/hyperliquid/check_spikes.py ('Top 6 addresses by PnL, at point of extraction').
provenance.note: A point-in-time snapshot of leaderboard rank, not a live or maintained ranking. Rank/positions may have changed since capture.
